text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hm. Five minutes have passed since our designated departure time,
and yet Yukino Bijin and Gold City are nowhere to be seen...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
We don't necessarily have to go together. We're all going to the same
place, right? So what's the big deal?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Well, we don't have to go together, but since we're a team, I think we should!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
The bus ride to the training camp is pretty long, right? So I prepared
lots of stuff for us to talk about! ♪ I can't wait to chat with you all!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I appreciate your thoughtfulness, Curren Chan. I, too, believe that in
order to make this festival a success, we will need to work as a team.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Thankfully, we still have some time. Let's wait five more minutes and
then—

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: M-my apol'gies!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ah! Yukino and City, you made it! You okay?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Pant... Wheeze... G-guys, I'm so sorry! I ended up spend'n too much time pack'n my stuff...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
No, it's my fault! Yukino's only late because I overslept and she came
all the way to the Ritto dorms to pick me up.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
No, not at all! I was already runn'n late by the time I came t'pick you
up!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, but seriously, you were actually getting ready. I just totally
screwed up.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Aaand that's enough of fighting for the blame!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
We've got a bus to catch! We were just saying we've got plenty of
time, so no hard feelings. 'Kay?♪

text_block_list.name: City and Yukino
text_block_list.text: ...Okay.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... Pretty sure this trip is gonna be what you would call "an uphill
battle."

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Heh, do you think so? Well then, let's be on our way.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
We're heeeeere! Wow, it's so traditional and Japanese-feeling! How
exciting! ♪ Oh, Brian? Can I get a snap of you in front of the inn?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: You know... You haven't stopped blathering since we got on the bus.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, yeah, I'm just so excited! ♪ But that makes me easy to get
along with, right? I'm just like your bestie Maya!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...You're infuriatingly mistaken.

text_block_list.name: Innkeeper
text_block_list.text:
Ah, you must be the group from Tracen Academy! I bet you're tired
from the long journey. Please come in! Welcome to our inn!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hello. I'm Symboli Rudolf, the one you spoke to on the phone the
other day. Thank you for your cooperation with this training camp.

text_block_list.name: Innkeeper
text_block_list.text:
The pleasure is all mine! My grandchild is an Umamusume too, and we
look forward to the Fleetfoot Festival every year. Please let me know
if I can help you with anything!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
We appreciate it. Now then, let us head to our rooms and unpack our
things. When that's finished, we'll have a briefing.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: It looks like everyone is ready. Then let's begin.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
The aim of this training camp is to improve our skills in preparation
for the Fleetfoot Festival. I want each of us to fully comprehend the
roles and responsibilities we were dealt, so allow me to explain.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Firstly, Narita Brian. You will be performing in the archery show with
me.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It is a ritual of unparalleled valor. With a purified bow and arrow in
hand, the archer must leap over rocks and cliffs on the sacred
mountain as they shoot at a number of targets that represent
misfortune.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Or so it was. In modern times, the ritual has been simplified, and now
there is only one target set up in front of the sacred mountain.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Nevertheless, archery practice will be essential. I believe you have
some experience with it, correct?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I had to go to lessons with my big sis.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Heh. Perhaps because it is tradition, archery is a popular skill to learn
among Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I, too, have received instruction in the past, but we will work together
to further improve our skills at this camp.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
They've set up a temporary training ground for us nearby. Our
equipment has also arrived. Shall we begin practice this afternoon,
Brian?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... I'm tired of having the Empress yelling in one ear and my sister
blathering on in the other. I get it—this is serious.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Whatever you want me to do, I'll do it. But I won't practice for a
moment longer than I have to. I'm leaving as soon as I've got the feel
for it back.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: All right, that's not a problem. Let's move on to the ceremonial dance.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Yep, yep! Me, Yukino, and City are gonna devote a dance to the
Three Goddesses, right? ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
We'll thank them for everything and ask them to keep watching over
us... with our super cute dance!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Cute?! I-I'll do my best!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Calm down, Yukino. So the lessons will be in the local community hall,
and our teacher is being sent from the URA, right?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Yes. The teacher is a member of the URA who is well-versed in the
ceremonial dance. They should be arriving this afternoon, too.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I've danced for my concerts before, but I've never done a ritual dance
like this... I'm gonna make sure I get it super cute and polished! ♪

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Good... Then we're all finished here. Meeting adjourned! I expect
each of you to dedicate yourselves to your training!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I almost forgot. There's one more important thing I want you to
keep in mind.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
As Umamusume, our physical condition is of utmost importance.
Please take care not to get too overzealous.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: In other words, during your training, be sure to stay on track!
